/usr/bin/ar qc libpipeann_original_core.a CMakeFiles/pipeann_original_core.dir/third_party/pipeann/src/index.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipeann_original_core.dir/third_party/pipeann/src/ssd_index.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipeann_original_core.dir/third_party/pipeann/src/update/direct_insert.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipeann_original_core.dir/third_party/pipeann/src/update/delete_merge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipeann_original_core.dir/third_party/pipeann/src/utils/index_build_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipeann_original_core.dir/third_party/pipeann/src/utils/pipnn.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipeann_original_core.dir/third_party/pipeann/src/utils/linux_aligned_file_reader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipeann_original_core.dir/third_party/pipeann/src/utils/partition.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipeann_original_core.dir/third_party/pipeann/src/utils/kmeans_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipeann_original_core.dir/third_party/pipeann/src/utils/distance.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipeann_original_core.dir/third_party/pipeann/src/search/coro_search.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipeann_original_core.dir/third_party/pipeann/src/search/beam_search.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipeann_original_core.dir/third_party/pipeann/src/search/page_search.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipeann_original_core.dir/third_party/pipeann/src/search/pipe_search.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pipeann_original_core.dir/third_party/pipeann/src/search/spec_filter_search.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libpipeann_original_core.a
